3106880.name: Into The Matrix
3106880.description:
"Into the Matrix" is an online co-op horror game for up to 3 players. Team up with friends to navigate through various maps, solving unique puzzles with different mechanics in each area. the game features real references backroom and iconic entities .

Explore each map carefully, searching for items to help you progress and unlock new areas. As you go deeper, the environment becomes more dangerous. To survive, you must observe your surroundings, spot entities, and master evasion tactics.

manage your inventory, solve puzzles, and unlock new sections of the map. The game immerses players with its challenging game play, intense difficulty, and spooky atmosphere. Expect creepy environments that constantly make you feel like something’s wrong. Dark, empty spaces, strange sounds, and unsettling visuals—like worn-out carpets and pale, faded walls—will keep you on edge. As you move through the maps, the feeling of danger just keeps getting stronger.
3106880.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
